about.title: Why does this project exist?
about.slogan: Companies have HR teams to craft perfect job offers. You have jobi.
about.p1: Searching for a job is exhausting. Every offer seems to ask for a different cover letter, a different tone, a different pitch. Most of the time the barrier is not experience, it is not knowing how to present it.
about.p2: jobi Assistant was born from that frustration. It is an open source tool, free, no sign up and no data stored. Built so that anyone, anywhere in the world, can apply for a job with the same confidence as someone who has a mentor or an HR team behind them.
about.p3: Just paste your CV and the job offer. The AI does the rest: a LinkedIn message, a short pitch and a full cover letter, tailored to that specific job and in the language of the posting.
about.opensource.desc: Free to use, modify and share.
about.private.desc: Nothing is stored. Your API key goes directly to Groq, never through any other server.
footer.forall: Built so everyone can apply with confidence.
form.apikey.tutorial: How do I get my API key?
tutorial.title: How to get your Groq API key
tutorial.step1.title: Go to console.groq.com
tutorial.step1.desc: Create a free account with your email or Google. No credit card required.
tutorial.step2.title: Go to "API Keys" in the sidebar
tutorial.step2.desc: Click "Create API Key", give it a name and confirm.
tutorial.step3.title: Copy the key and paste it in jobi Assistant
tutorial.step3.desc: The key starts with gsk_. Copy it and paste it in the field above.
tutorial.footer: Free · No credit card · Ready in 2 minutes
